content:
23/8 update:
- Added all recently localized codenames (aka awakener bossfight names) to Character Prototypes, updated tab name to reflect info (https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1405864369371349072)
- Added Horla's transaction with Daffodil
- Added more accurate timeframe for Daffodil's event
- Added info about Faint
- Added a new tab, **Known Paradoxes & Errors**, for listing timeline crisises as I discover them but are unfortunately currently canon.
- Removed the side story tracker because i've unlocked everything important now
